Title: Minimal Boho Zodiac Botanical Wall Art Set
Description:
Celebrate the magic of nature and the cosmos with this beautiful bohemian botanical wall art set. Featuring delicate illustrations of various plants, including lavender, ferns, and blossoming branches, alongside minimalist zodiac symbols (moon, triangle, circle), this piece is perfect for adding a touch of earthy elegance to any room.

The muted sage green background and soft, natural color palette ensure this print complements various decor styles, from modern boho to farmhouse chic. It makes a wonderful piece of art for:

  • Nursery Decor: A soothing, gentle addition to a baby's room.
  • Bedroom Wall Art: Enhancing the tranquility of a restful sanctuary.
  • Home Office: Adding natural, calming energy to a workspace.
  • Gift Idea: A thoughtful and stylish gift for astrology lovers, plant enthusiasts, or bohemian decorators.

Details & Style:

  • Design: A harmonious blend of astrology and botanicals, symbolizing growth, cycles, and natural beauty.
  • Look and Feel: The illustrations are done in a refined, hand-drawn style, giving the print an artisanal, gallery-wall quality.
  • Use: This digital or printable art piece is designed to be framed and hung, bringing nature's peace into your home.

Perfect for creating a curated, calming atmosphere in any space.
